full_text:
Qiu Jian 丘建
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qiu Jian (丘建). Commander of Zhong Hui, helped warn Wei forces of Zhong Hui’s revolt. Qiu Jian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
